## BaseKeyboardNavigation.navigationHijackerEvents property

Get the navigation hijacker events.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected get navigationHijackerEvents(): XEventsOf<ArrowKey>[];
```

## Remarks

If the same [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) is defined multiple times it is only inserted once.
